arts.ttl: Celtic rock Rangers with stunning SWPL comeback as Elena Sadiku rages at penalty for foul 'outside the box'
arts.sum: Celya Barclais got the last laugh in a 2-2 thriller at Broadwood

arts.ttl: Lucas Perri undisturbed by the situation of Anthony Lopes at Lyon
arts.sum: According to L’Équipe, Lucas Perri (26) is not really disturbed by the treatment of fellow goalkeeper Anthony Lopes (34) at Olympique Lyonnais. The Brazillian stopper has replaced the Lyon academy graduate…

arts.ttl: Rangers vs Lyon LIVE as battle fever starts to get a grip of Ibrox
arts.sum: It's a huge night on the south side of Glasgow as the Light Blues look to continue their winning run

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer convinced Aberdeen can win the title as heavy schedule hits Celtic and Rangers
arts.sum: The Dons are right up there under Jimmy Thelin thanks to an incredible start to the season

arts.ttl: Hibs star told Rangers rival he would be moving to Ibrox DURING match – days later he was paraded by Celtic
arts.sum: The Easter Road was playmaker was chased by the Light Blues but Hibs wouldn't sell

arts.ttl: Celtic aim to bounce back from Dortmund defeat to match Rangers record
arts.sum: Celtic suffered a chastening 7-1 defeat away at Borussia Dortmund on Tuesday night, conceding as many goals in that game as they had in their last 14 Premiership games combined.

arts.ttl: Celtic and Rangers fans in heated Champions League Hotline war of words as they bicker over which 7-1 was worse
arts.sum: Craig Swan mans the phone as the criticism continues to fly Celtic's way

arts.ttl: Nermanja Matic shows no Rangers fear as Lyon veteran welcomes 'extra pressure' of Ibrox cauldron
arts.sum: The experienced midfielder is relishing playing the Light Blues in the Europa League

arts.ttl: Scott Brown brands Alfredo Morelos 'stupid' as Celtic hero names the mistake Rangers rival kept making
arts.sum: The Ayr United boss couldn't resist a fresh swipe at the Colombian

arts.ttl: I’m a Rangers title winner and sparked Dutch farmers fury with my take on doping scandal that rocked world football
arts.sum: In the early noughties a string of high-profile players were banned for testing positive for nandrolone
